channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-17701] sanity-scrub test_5: RIP: 0010:memset_erms+0x9/0x20
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for jianyu <yujian@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/c798f05a-0fdb-41c2-ab72-25e5009ec433

test_5 failed with the following error:

onyx-99vm4 crashed during sanity-scrub test_5

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/103805 - 5.14.0-362.18.1.el9_3.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/103805 - 4.18.0-513.18.1.el8_lustre.x86_64

Unmounting one of the MDTs hung:

Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: umount -d -f /mnt/lustre-mds3
watchdog: BUG: soft lockup - CPU#1 stuck for 22s! [umount:201397]
Modules linked in: dm_flakey osp(OE) mdd(OE) lod(OE) mdt(OE) lfsck(OE) mgs(OE) mgc(OE) osd_ldiskfs(OE) ldiskfs(OE) lquota(OE) lustre(OE) mdc(OE) lov(OE) osc(OE) lmv(OE) fid(OE) fld(OE) ksocklnd(OE) ptlrpc(OE) obdclass(OE) lnet(OE) libcfs(OE) rpcsec_gss_krb5 auth_rpcgss nfsv4 dns_resolver nfs lockd grace fscache intel_rapl_msr intel_rapl_common sunrpc crct10dif_pclmul crc32_pclmul ghash_clmulni_intel i2c_piix4 virtio_balloon joydev pcspkr dm_mod ext4 mbcache jbd2 ata_generic ata_piix libata virtio_net net_failover crc32c_intel serio_raw failover virtio_blk [last unloaded: dm_flakey]
CPU: 1 PID: 201397 Comm: umount Kdump: loaded Tainted: G           OE    --------- -  - 4.18.0-513.18.1.el8_lustre.x86_64 #1
Hardware name: Red Hat KVM, BIOS 0.5.1 01/01/2011
RIP: 0010:memset_erms+0x9/0x20
Code: 01 48 0f af c6 f3 48 ab 89 d1 f3 aa 4c 89 c8 c3 cc cc cc cc 66 66 2e 0f 1f 84 00 00 00 00 00 66 90 49 89 f9 40 88 f0 48 89 d1 <f3> aa 4c 89 c8 c3 cc cc cc cc 66 66 2e 0f 1f 84 00 00 00 00 00 66 
RSP: 0018:ffffa99802fcfad8 EFLAGS: 00010246 ORIG_RAX: ffffffffffffff13
RAX: ffff980991ed325a RBX: ffff98096f011800 RCX: 0000000000088000
RDX: 0000000000100000 RSI: 000000000000005a RDI: ffff98095bb78000
RBP: ffff98096f011828 R08: 0000000000000001 R09: ffff98095bb00000
R10: ffff980963e01c00 R11: 0000000000000001 R12: dead000000000200
R13: dead000000000100 R14: ffff980963e02c00 R15: ffff98096f011800
FS:  00007f3713ede080(0000) GS:ffff9809ffd00000(0000) knlGS:0000000000000000
CS:  0010 DS: 0000 ES: 0000 CR0: 0000000080050033
CR2: 000055eb9cbacf44 CR3: 00000000505f6003 CR4: 00000000001706e0
Call Trace:
 <IRQ>
 ? watchdog_timer_fn.cold.10+0x46/0x9e
 ? watchdog+0x30/0x30
 ? __hrtimer_run_queues+0x101/0x280
 ? hrtimer_interrupt+0x100/0x220
 ? smp_apic_timer_interrupt+0x6a/0x130
 ? apic_timer_interrupt+0xf/0x20
 </IRQ>
 ? memset_erms+0x9/0x20
 ptlrpc_service_purge_all+0x45b/0xa30 [ptlrpc]
 ptlrpc_unregister_service+0x422/0x9d0 [ptlrpc]
 ? kmem_cache_alloc_trace+0x142/0x280
 ? lprocfs_counter_add+0x12a/0x1a0 [obdclass]
 mds_stop_ptlrpc_service+0x69/0x1b0 [mdt]
 mds_device_fini+0x28/0xd0 [mdt]
 obd_precleanup+0x1e5/0x220 [obdclass]
 class_cleanup+0x31e/0x900 [obdclass]
 class_process_config+0x3ad/0x21f0 [obdclass]
 ? class_manual_cleanup+0x191/0x780 [obdclass]
 ? __kmalloc+0x113/0x250
 ? lprocfs_counter_add+0x12a/0x1a0 [obdclass]
 class_manual_cleanup+0x456/0x780 [obdclass]
 server_put_super+0xb9f/0x1100 [ptlrpc]
 generic_shutdown_super+0x6c/0x110
 kill_anon_super+0x14/0x30
 deactivate_locked_super+0x34/0x70
 cleanup_mnt+0x3b/0x70
 task_work_run+0x8a/0xb0
 exit_to_usermode_loop+0xef/0x100
 do_syscall_64+0x19c/0x1b0
 entry_SYSCALL_64_after_hwframe+0x61/0xc6
RIP: 0033:0x7f3712e48e9b

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
sanity-scrub test_5 - onyx-99vm4 crashed during sanity-scrub test_5

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
